entries.source: Our Service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, videos, or other material (“Content”). You are responsible for Content that you post on or through Service, including its legality, reliability, and appropriateness. By posting Content on or through Service, You represent and warrant that: (i) Content is yours (you own it) and/or you have the right to use it and the right to grant us the rights and license as provided in these Terms, and (ii) that the posting of your Content on or through Service does not violate the privacy rights, publicity rights, copyrights, contract rights or any other rights of any person or entity. We reserve the right to terminate the account of anyone found to be infringing on a copyright. You retain any and all of your rights to any Content you submit, post or display on or through Service and you are responsible for protecting those rights. We take no responsibility and assume no liability for Content you or any third party posts on or through Service. However, by posting Content using Service you grant us the right and license to use, modify, publicly perform, publicly display, reproduce, and distribute such Content on and through Service. You agree that this license includes the right for us to make your Content available to other users of Service, who may also use your Content subject to these Terms. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) has the right but not the obligation to monitor and edit all Content provided by users. In addition, Content found on or through this Service are the property of Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) or used with permission. You may not distribute, modify, transmit, reuse, download, repost, copy, or use said Content, whether in whole or in part, for commercial purposes or for personal gain, without express advance written permission from us.
entries.value: Naša storitev omogučuje vam da objavite, ptezujete, pohranite, dijelite in na drugi način date na raspolaganje odredžene informacije, tekst, grafiku, video, ali drugi materijal ("kontent"). Vi ste odgovorni za vsebina ki ste objavili na ali putem storitve, uključujuči njegto zakonitost, pouzdanost in prikladnost. Postavljanjem vsebinaa na ali putem storitve, zastupate in jamčite da: (i) Vsebina je vaš (posjedujete ga) i/ili imate pravo uporabljati ga in pravo da nam date prava in licencu kako je predvidženo ovim Pogojima, in (ii) da postavljanje Vašeg vsebinaa na ali putem storitve ne krši prava zasebnosti, prava javnosti, avtorske pravice, prava ugovora ali bilo ki druga prava bilo ki osobe ali subjekta. Pridržavamo se prava da prekinemo račun svakoga tko se smatra kršenjem autorskih prava. Zadržavate bilo ki in sva vaša prava na bilo ki vsebina ki predajete, objavite ali prikazujete na ali putem storitve in odgovorni ste za zaštitu tih prava. Mi ne preuzimamo nikakvu odgovornost in ne preuzimamo nikakvu odgovornost za Vsebina vas ali bilo ki tretje osebe postte na ali putem storitve. Medžutim, postavljanjem vsebinaa koristeči uslugu dajete nam pravo in licencu za uporaba, izmjenu, javno obavljanje, javni prikaz, reprodukciju, in distribuciju takvog vsebinaa na in kroz uslugu. Slažete se da ova licenca uključuje pravo da vaš vsebina bude dostupan drugim uporabnikima storitve, ki takodžer mogu uporabljati Vaš vsebina pod ovim pogojima. Velika indijska podjetje (Držeči partnerstvo firma, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ima pravo, ali nije obveza da prati in uredžuje sve vsebinae ki pružaju uporabniki. Osim toga, Vsebina pronadžen na ali kroz to uslugu je vlasništvo Velike indijske tvrtke (Držeči partnerstvo firme, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ali se koristi z dopuštenjem. Ne smijete distribuirati, mijenjati, ponovno uporabljati, preuzimati, kopirati, kopirati ali uporabljati navedeni vsebina, v cijelosti ali djelomično, za komercijalne namene ali za osobnu dobit, bez ekspresne pismene dozvole od nas.

entries.source: Our Service may contain links to other sites that are not operated by us. If you click a third party link, you will be directed to that third party’s site. We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit. We assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third party sites or services.

Snažno Vam savjetujemo da pregledate Pravila o zasebnosti svih stranica ki posjetite. Mi preuzimamo odgovornost za vsebina, pravila o zasebnosti ali prakse bilo ki tretje osebe web-stranice ali storitev.

Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) nema nadzor nad vsebinaem, pravilima o zasebnosti ali praksama bilo kih web-mjesta ali storitev trečih strana te za njih ne preuzima odgovornost. entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Philosophy Lab način učenja z UI je osredotočen način uporabe UI za učenje namesto pasivnega zbiranja odgovorov. Način je zgrajen okoli posebne naloge: Razišči identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.

entries.value: Vadi pogajanje, konflikt, podporo strankam, vodenje ali kateri koli pogovor z velikim pomenom.

entries.source: Practice real conversations
entries.value: Vadi resnične pogovore

entries.source: Practice real conversations.
entries.value: Vježbajte prave razgovore.

entries.value: Vaditi ugovore

entries.value: Vježbanje dovodženje.

entries.value: Vježbajte izgovaranje ideje jasno

entries.source: Practice stronger answers
entries.value: Vadi boljše odgovore

entries.source: Practice stronger answers.
entries.value: Vježbajte jače odgovore.

entries.source: practice test
entries.value: Ispitivanje prakse

entries.source: Practice Test Builder
entries.value: Graditelj vadbenih testov

entries.source: Practice the final claim aloud until it feels owned.
entries.value: Prakticirajte konačnu tvrdnju naglas dok se ne osječa vlasništvom.

entries.source: Practice tough real-life conversations
entries.value: Vadi zahtevne pogovore iz resničnega življenja

entries.source: Practice tough real-life conversations.
entries.value: Vježbajte teške razgovore v stvarnom životu.

entries.source: Practice transfer. Ask for a similar problem with different numbers, wording, or context.
entries.value: Praktični predennos. Vprašajte za podoben problem z različitim brojevima, tekstom, ali kontekstom.

entries.source: Practice viva, oral exams, project defenses, and rapid follow-up questions with calm feedback.
entries.value: Vadi ustne zagovore, ustne izpite, zagovore projektov in hitra dodatna vprašanja z mirnimi povratnimi informacijami.

entries.source: Practice, not answer-copying
entries.value: Vaja, ne prepisovanje odgovorov

entries.source: Practise inside the lesson
entries.value: Vaditi znotraj lekcije

entries.source: Practise recall
entries.value: Vadi priklic

entries.source: Practise retrieval before rereading
entries.value: Vadi priklic pred ponovnim branjem

entries.source: Practise saying it
entries.value: Vježbaj da to kažeš

entries.source: Predict grades and plan score targets
entries.value: Napovej ocene in načrtuj ciljne rezultate

entries.source: Predict what the code or data should do before asking for help.
entries.value: Predvidite kar kod ali podatki trebaju učiniti preden nego kar zatražite pomoč.

entries.source: Predict what the code or data should do before asking.
entries.value: Predvidjeti kar kod ali podatki trebaju učiniti preden nego vprašaju.

entries.source: Predict, explain, test mentally or safely, and reflect on evidence.
entries.value: Predvidjeti, razložiti, testirati mentalno ali sigurno, in razmišljati o dokazima.

entries.source: Prefer lesson blocks, maps, simulations, contrast pairs, rubrics, and concise coach prompts over free-form lecture.
entries.value: Poželjni blokovi lekcije, mape, simulacije, kontrastni parovi, rubrike, in koncizni trener promiče preko besplatne forme predavanja.

entries.source: Prepare a deep work session with a clear outcome, constraints, focus rules, review checkpoint, and fallback plan.
entries.value: Pripravi sejo poglobljenega dela z jasnim izidom, omejitvami, pravili zbranosti, kontrolno točko za pregled in rezervnim načrtom.

entries.source: Prepare clear forum questions, replies, summaries, and follow-up requests that make student discussions more useful.
entries.value: Pripravi jasna forumska vprašanja, odgovore, povzetke in nadaljnje prošnje, zaradi katerih so študentske razprave uporabnejše.

entries.source: Prepare for an exam
entries.value: Pripravi se na izpit

entries.source: Prepare for an exam with active recall
entries.value: Pripremite se za ispit z aktivnim opozivom

entries.source: Prepare for oral questioning
entries.value: Pripravi se na ustno spraševanje

entries.source: Prepare for oral questioning.
entries.value: Pripremite se za oralno ispitivanje.

entries.source: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: Pripravi se na šolske razgovore, razgovore za prakso, službo ali štipendijo z realističnimi vprašanji in povratnimi informacijami.

entries.source: Prepare learners for oral exams through realistic questioning.
entries.value: Pripremite učence za usne ispite kroz realno ispitivanje.

entries.source: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, or oral exams with prompts, timing, and feedback on structure.
entries.value: Pripravi govore, predstavitve, razgovore ali ustne izpite s pozivi, merjenjem časa in povratnimi informacijami o strukturi.

entries.source: Prepare study resources for classmates or a group: summaries, links, notes, explanations, and usage guidance.
entries.value: Pripravi učne vire za sošolce ali skupino: povzetke, povezave, zapiske, razlage in navodila za uporabo.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Pripremljeni tečajevi, video, in vaje su najjači ko učenec zna temu niz.

entries.source: Present an argument, wait for rebuttal, identify weak spots, and strengthen the learner's reasoning.
entries.value: Predstavite argument, čekajte na opovrgavanje, identificirati slabe točke, in ojačati obrazloženje učenca.

entries.source: Present evidence, ask for decisions, reveal consequences, and debrief principles.
entries.value: Sadašnji dokazi, traže odluke, otkrivaju posljedice in načela ispitivanja.

entries.value: Načela

entries.value: Razvrsti naloge po pomembnosti

entries.source: Prioritize by urgency and effort, break tasks down, and update status.
entries.value: Prioritet hitnom in napornom, razbijanje nalogaa, in ažuriranje statusa.

entries.source: Prioritize topics
entries.value: Razvrsti teme po pomembnosti

entries.source: Prioritize topics.
entries.value: Prioritetizirajte teme.

entries.source: Prioritize, schedule, add practice and review, then adjust as progress changes.
entries.value: Prioritet, urnik, dodati praksu in pregled, a zatim prilagoditi kao spremembe napretka.

entries.source: Prioritize, shrink oversized tasks, track progress, and close with a review.
entries.value: Prioritetizirati, smanjiti velike naloge, pratiti napredak, in blizu z recenzijom.

entries.source: Privacy
entries.value: Zasebnost

entries.value: Pravila o zasebnosti

entries.source: Privacy Policy
entries.value: Pravilnik o zasebnosti

entries.source: Privacy Policy | inspir
entries.value: Pravilnik o zasebnosti | inspir

entries.source: Private saved chat URLs are not sitemap-listed and are not included in llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or the JSON AI content catalog.
entries.value: Privatni sačuvani chat URLs nisu na listi stranica in nisu uključeni v llms.txt, llms-ful.txt, ali JSON UI katalog vsebinaa.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Privatno podučavanje je močno, ali nije jednako dostupno. Besplatna javna UI platforma za učenje lahko pomoči smanjiti taj dostop jaz dajuči više ljudi prvo mjesto za učenje.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: Privatno podučavanje je močno, ali je nejednako rasporedženo. inspir koristi UI za proširenje dostopa dok drži učenca aktivnim: savjete preden odgovora, vprašanja preden predavanja, in praksu nakon objašnjenja.

entries.source: Project Coach
entries.value: Trener za projekte

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Project Coach način učenja z UI je osredotočen način uporabe UI za učenje namesto pasivnega zbiranja odgovorov. Način je zgrajen okoli posebne naloge: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
